steps.title: Identify the essential names
steps.content: The names Laura Gee and Muriel Niederle identify which behavioral economists the sentence is about. Because the names are essential to the subject, they should not be set off with commas.

steps.title: Do not interrupt the subject
steps.content: A adds a comma before the predicate, C incorrectly separates the two names, and D treats the essential names as nonessential. The no-comma version keeps the complete subject intact before integrate. The answer is B.
